en: Do you use any software solution that integrates operations such as purchasing, order management, cost control, document management scheduling, etc.?
de: Nutzen Sie eine Softwarelösung, in der Bereiche wie Einkauf, Auftragsmanagement, Kostenüberwachung, Dokumentenmanagement, Terminplanung usw. zusammengeführt werden?

en: Do you have any Technology Partnership agreement with other companies?
de: Haben Sie Technologiepartnerschaften mit anderen Unternehmen geschlossen?

en: The facilities, manufacturing facilities, in progress projects have been visited by a competent person within the Vendor / Subcontractor required disciplines
de: Die Anlagen, Fertigungseinrichtungen und laufenden Projekte wurden von einer Person besucht, die kompetent in den Fachrichtungen ist, die vom Anbieter/Unterauftragnehmer gefordert werden.

en: The Vendor / Subcontractor meets the requirements of the specific project
de: Der Anbieter/Unterauftragnehmer erfüllt die Anforderungen des Projekts in Frage.

en:
This section is designed to formally demonstrate that a supplier is fit to perform the scope of work they are being contracted for — safely, competently, and sustainably.
It helps Linxon answer three fundamental questions.
</br>

* Can the supplier do the work? (technical capability)
* Do they have enough resources to do it properly? (capacity)
* Can they do it without undue risk? (HSE, operational, and compliance risk)

Linxon HSE approval confirms that:
</br>
* The information has been reviewed
* The stated capability matches the required scope
* Any gaps or limitations are acknowledged and accepted
